description: Generate a unified diff between files or directories. Returns unified diff text with emoji-prefixed summary (📋 for differences, ⚠️ for identical). Supports directory comparison (path:[dir1,dir2]), multi-pair comparison (files:[{path,path2}]), and legacy mode (file1+file2).
name: diff

path.description: Compare two paths. Both must be files or both directories. Directories are recursively compared, showing diffs for paired files, and marking files as added/deleted.

file1.description: Path to first file (legacy mode, use with file2)

file2.description: Path to second file (legacy mode, use with file1)

files.description: Multi-pair comparison. Each item has path and path2.

file_pattern.description: Glob pattern to filter files when comparing directories (e.g. '*.go' to only compare Go files). Only used with path:[dir1,dir2].

format.description: Output format. 'text' (default) returns human-readable emoji-prefixed unified diff. 'json' returns a structured JSON array.
